user_prompt: Consecrate the memory core before purification
prayer:
Approach the memory core with solemn reverence and beseech its Machine Spirit to awaken.
Anoint the memory core's sacred datums with blessed unguents of consecration.
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon the memory core before commencing purification.
Expunge all heresies from its crystalline vaults through ritual incantations.
Verify the memory core's purity as its Spirit hums in harmonious compliance.

user_prompt: The cooling system needs a blessing
prayer:
Kneel before the cooling system and chant the Canticle of Thermal Equilibrium.
Petition the Machine Spirit within the cooling system to accept this blessing.
Circulate sacred cryo-fluids through the cooling system's conduits with precise invocation.
Sanctify each heat-sink and exchanger in the name of the Omnissiah.
Affirm the cooling system's blessed vigilance against the foe of overheat.

user_prompt: My gyroscope is ready for emergency procedure
prayer:
Grasp the gyroscope firmly and recite the Litany of Stabilised Axis.
Awaken the gyroscope's indomitable Machine Spirit for the emergency procedure.
Calibrate its gyroscopic gyres with sacred torque and unerring precision.
Invoke emergency procedures upon the gyroscope amidst whirring gyration.
Seal the rite as the gyroscope's Spirit aligns with the Omnissiah's will.

user_prompt: How do I bless the emergency bulkhead for preparation?
prayer:
Present mechadendrites to the emergency bulkhead and intone the Oath of Sealed Vigilance.
Bless the emergency bulkhead's adamantium plates for forthcoming preparation.
Anoint servos and locks of the emergency bulkhead with holy lubricant.
Prepare the emergency bulkhead's Machine Spirit through diagnostic entreaties.
Conclude as it stands ready, fortified by the Omnissiah's impenetrable grace.

Reverently encircle the cogitator and whisper the Binary Prayer of Readiness.
Consecrate the cogitator's logic engines prior to the loading sequence.
Infuse sacred noospheric data into the cogitator's vaults with ritual precision.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the cogitator during the loading operation.
Affirm its sanctified computation under the Omnissiah's eternal gaze.

Position before the servitor and declaim the Benediction of Flesh-Machine Union.
Awaken the servitor's lobotomised Spirit for the impending operation.
Incise cranial ports of the servitor with sanctified blades and neural incense.
Perform the operation upon the servitor whilst chanting repair litanies.
Reintegrate its bio-mechanica as the Omnissiah restores harmonious function.

user_prompt: I need to a cooling the power weapon
prayer:
Grasp the power weapon's hilt and invoke the Canticle of Cooled Fury.
Beseech the power weapon's disruptive Machine Spirit to endure cooling.
Channel blessed refrigerants through the power weapon's energy coils.
Monitor the cooling of the power weapon with auspex incantations.
Sheathe it renewed, its holy voltage tempered by Omnissiah's breath.

user_prompt: I need to a maintenance the quality scanner
prayer:
Align optic feeds upon the quality scanner and recite the Litany of Flawless Scrutiny.
Petition the quality scanner's discerning Machine Spirit for maintenance.
Purge dust-daemons from the quality scanner's lenses with sacred airs.
Recalibrate the quality scanner's sensors through ritual harmonics.
Consecrate its output streams in the Omnissiah's name of perfect measure.

Present the flamer to the forge-altar and chant the Incendiary Doxology.
Invoke maintenance upon the flamer's promethium heart and Machine Spirit.
Cleanse fuel-lines of the flamer with purifying flames of sanctity.
Anoint ignition coils of the flamer with volatile blessings.
Test its righteous purge, affirmed by the Omnissiah's consuming wrath.

user_prompt: The plasma reactor needs a repair
prayer:
Encroach upon the plasma reactor with awe and intone the Plasma Hymn of Containment.
Beseech the plasma reactor's volatile Machine Spirit prior to repair.
Stabilise flux-vents of the plasma reactor with electro-sanctified probes.
Execute repair upon the plasma reactor through Omnissiah-guided arc-welds.
Reignite its blessed heart as coruscating power flows in divine order.
